scripts.run:dryrun: k6 run create_streams.js -e SKIP_TX=1 -e VESTING_CONTRACT=placeholder -e TOKEN=placeholder
scripts.run:testnet: k6 run create_streams_bundle.js -e RPC_URL=https://soroban-testnet.stellar.org -e VESTING_CONTRACT=$VESTING_CONTRACT -e TOKEN=$TOKEN -e SPONSOR_SECRETS=$SPONSOR_SECRETS
